title: Investigation: Labour Campaign For Electoral Reform (LCER)
text:
Subject: Labour Campaign For Electoral Reform (LCER)

Investigated for: Failing to report recordable donations on time

Decision: No further action

Summary of reasons: Sanctions were not considered appropriate given the mitigation provided by LCER. This decision was in line with our Enforcement Policy.
